posts.author: Jacob1 (Jacob)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great to be able to hide the Total row and column of a pivot table to help make them more aesthetic as the total is not always necessary.

What are you trying to achieve

I have a pivot table that collates employees progress on certain training courses (which is tracked on individual boards), this progress is a Status column ,i,e To-do, Training or Completed. There is no need for a total column that displays “Completed, Training, To-do”.
